JSON Schema only enforces structural/syntactic rules. Author-name matching, session-meta consistency, feedback markdown header — left to validator code (task 1.8). additionalProperties=false at all levels prevents silent field drift from LLM responses.

Acceptable: validate() is idempotent against a valid command; defense-in-depth at the use-case boundary aligns with spec 7.4 step 2 explicit re-validation. Task 1.7 AiGenerationCommitService can rely on this. Integration test deferred due to pre-existing ObjectMapper bean autoconfig issue unrelated to this change.

warnings: MISSING_TRANSCRIPT_ABSENCE_ASSERTION (RedisAiGenerationJobStoreTest:43): test does not explicitly assert hash lacks `transcript` field — code is correct but coverage gap for §8.3 PII regression
MISSING_ERROR_TRUNCATION_TEST (RedisAiGenerationJobStoreTest:130): no test for >512-char error message truncation; adapter does .take(512) but uncovered
NON_ATOMIC_SAVE (RedisAiGenerationJobStore:45): 4-op save() not Lua-atomic — spec doesn't mandate but RedisRateLimitAdapter idiom suggests improvement
INCONSISTENT_FALLBACK_BEHAVIOR (JobStore vs CostGuard): JobStore re-throws, CostGuard fail-open — document divergence in KDoc
HINCRBYFLOAT_PRECISION: cost accumulator uses Redis float; small drift acceptable for $20 cap but flag for analytics consumers
MONTHLY_TTL_NOT_SLIDING: counter EXPIREs only on first INCR (fixed window anchored to first usage) — spec says 'sliding'; document semantics
MISSING_BEAN_FALLBACK_CONTRACT: no @ConditionalOnMissingBean no-op; downstream wiring must use Optional<AiGenerationJobStore> when aigen disabled

warnings: ERROR_MSG_BOUNDARY_GAP: tests cover only 700-char truncation; exactly-512, 0-char, UTF-8 multi-byte at boundary 511/513 not covered
SURROGATE_SPLIT_RISK: .take(512) operates on UTF-16 code units; supplementary-plane code point at position 511 could split surrogate pair → invalid UTF-16
ERROR_MSG_MASKING_NOT_ENFORCED: adapter blindly stores caller string; §8.3 masking obligation lives upstream — defense-in-depth missing
ENUM_VARIANT_GAP: tests don't exercise COMMIT/CANCEL (AuditKind), HIGHLIGHTS/ONE_LINE_REVIEWS/FEEDBACK_DOCUMENT (GenerationItem), OPENAI/GEMINI (Provider), CANCELLED (AuditStatus)
TOKEN_CLAMP_UNTESTED: toIntClamped() Long-overflow guard has no test
DEFAULT_INSTANT_NOW_IN_UPSERT: ClubDefault.upsert uses Instant.now() directly — non-injectable, test relies on Thread.sleep(5)
CREATED_AT_PRECISION_UNASSERTED: microsecond precision of DATETIME(6) round-trip not asserted
REDUNDANT_PROVIDER_CHECK isEnabled L78: id in allowlistedSet already implies provider enabled
UNCOVERED_GARBAGE_ENABLED_PROVIDER: no test for invalid entry in enabledProviders set
NON_DETERMINISTIC_ALLOWLISTED_ORDER: HashSet-backed; ok per spec

exposed_apis: JobStatus enum (PENDING, RUNNING, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, CANCELLED)
GenerationInput / RegenerationInput / GenerationOutput / RegenerationOutput data classes
task_0_1.key_decision: Omitted two unused imports flagged by advisor (SessionRecordVisibility, CurrentMember belong to task 0.5)
task_0_1.for_next_tasks: All Phase 0/1 ports must import from com.readmates.aigen.application.model.*. SessionImportV1Snapshot has nested AuthoredText for highlights/oneLineReviews. ErrorCode is the canonical error catalog — adapter LlmErrorMapper (task 1.5) maps SDK exceptions onto these codes. JobView is the read-shape; JobRecord (task 1.2 port) is the persistence-shape.

exposed_apis: table ai_generation_audit_log (job_id, session_id, club_id, host_user_id, kind, item, provider, model, transcript_sha256, input/cached_input/output_tokens, cost_estimate_usd DECIMAL(8,4), status, error_code, error_message VARCHAR(512), latency_ms, created_at; indexes idx_aigen_audit_session/_club/_host)
table ai_generation_club_defaults (club_id CHAR(36) PK, default_model VARCHAR(64), updated_at, updated_by; FK fk_aigen_default_club → clubs(id))
task_1_1.key_decision: DDL applied verbatim from spec 8.2.1/8.2.2 at V30/V31 (corrected path: db/mysql/migration/)
task_1_1.for_next_tasks: Audit-log writer (task_1_3) must populate created_at explicitly (no DDL default), use masked error_message ≤512 chars, never store transcript text. ClubDefault JDBC repo (task_1_3) uses CHAR(36) PK club_id.

exposed_apis: data class JobRecord (16 fields incl. transcript:String stored under separate Redis key, expiresAt:Instant)
sealed class GuardDecision { Allow / Deny(code: ErrorCode) }
task_1_2.key_decision: patchItem(value:Any) runtime-narrows to SessionImportV1Snapshot; private tools.jackson JsonMapper; Lua atomicity for patch+delete; JobStore re-throws on Redis failure (data path)
task_1_2.for_next_tasks: Orchestrator must pass FULL patched SessionImportV1Snapshot to patchItem (not per-item primitive). Bean is optional when aigen.enabled=false — wire via Optional<AiGenerationJobStore> or @ConditionalOnBean upstream. Existing ErrorCode values: HOST_DAILY_CAP_EXCEEDED, CLUB_MONTHLY_CAP_EXCEEDED. CostGuard does NOT enforce per-minute rate; existing RateLimitPort still handles that. Monthly TTL is fixed-window anchored to first INCRBYFLOAT — orchestrator must not assume sliding.

exposed_apis: data class AuditLogEntry (jobId/sessionId/clubId/hostUserId UUIDs, kind:AuditKind, item:GenerationItem?, provider:Provider, model:String, transcriptSha256:String?, usage:TokenUsage, costEstimateUsd:BigDecimal, status:AuditStatus, errorCode:ErrorCode?, errorMessage:String?, latencyMs:Int, createdAt:Instant)
enum AuditKind { FULL, REGENERATE, COMMIT, CANCEL }
data class ClubDefault(clubId, defaultModel, updatedAt, updatedBy)
@Repository JdbcAiGenerationAuditRepository — silently .take(512) on errorMessage; UTF-16 code-unit truncation
@Repository JdbcAiGenerationClubDefaultRepository — MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE; Instant.now() at write site
task_1_3.key_decision: Ports model AuditKind/AuditStatus as separate enums from ErrorCode; audit insert uses auto-increment id; ClubDefault upsert sets updated_at via Instant.now() inside adapter
task_1_3.for_next_tasks: Caller MUST mask errorMessage before passing (defense-in-depth not enforced at adapter). transcript_sha256 is single-hash hex string (caller computes). For OrchestratorService: pass model.name only, provider as separate Provider enum. ClubDefault load returns null when no row; fallback to AiGenerationProperties.fallbackDefaultModel is caller's responsibility.

exposed_apis: Provider prefix mapping: claude-* → CLAUDE, gpt-* OR ^o\d.* → OPENAI, gemini-* → GEMINI
CostCalculator.estimate(usage: TokenUsage, pricing: ModelPricing): BigDecimal (scale 4 HALF_UP)
task_1_4.key_decision: Empty enabledProviders set = kill switch (returns empty allowlist). Unknown model-name prefixes warn-logged + skipped (do not crash boot). resolveAlias treats alias as raw name match against allowlisted.
task_1_4.for_next_tasks: Orchestrator should fetch ModelCatalog from DI when aigen.enabled=true. CostCalculator is stateless object — no DI needed; call directly. To add OpenAI/Gemini support: just put pricing rows in yaml + enabledProviders. Provider override prefix mapping for new model families requires source edit in YamlModelCatalog.providerOf().

exposed_apis: object LlmPromptBuilder.buildRegenSystemPrompt(meta, item: GenerationItem, instructions, currentSnapshot: SessionImportV1Snapshot): String
object LlmErrorMapper.mapException(t: Throwable, provider: Provider): GenerationError — fixed enum messages only, no transcript param
task_1_5.key_decision: PII-safe error mapper: never propagates t.message; always returns one of three fixed strings (MSG_UNAVAILABLE / MSG_RATE_LIMITED / MSG_UNKNOWN). Prompt hard-bakes session meta + spec §9.3 rules + tool name emit_session_import_v1. Regen prompts narrow to single GenerationItem via exhaustive when{}.
task_1_5.for_next_tasks: Claude/OpenAI/Gemini adapter (task_1_6, 4_2, 5_3) MUST call LlmPromptBuilder for system prompts (do not re-author rules). Wrap SDK exceptions and call LlmErrorMapper.mapException(t, provider) — pass the throwable directly, NOT a transcript fragment. ErrorCode enum extension required for SCHEMA_INVALID/AUTHOR_NAME_MISMATCH/HIGHLIGHTS_OUT_OF_RANGE/etc. — already exists in AiGenerationModels.kt §88.

exposed_apis: interface ClaudeApiPort.callTool(model, systemPrompt, userText, transcriptText, toolName, toolSchema: ObjectNode, expectCacheControl: Boolean): ClaudeToolResult
data class ClaudeToolResult(input: ObjectNode, usage: TokenUsage)
@Component ClaudeApiClient : ClaudeApiPort (live impl stubbed; throws NotImplementedError until follow-up)
class LlmGenerationException(error: GenerationError, cause: Throwable) — wraps provider exceptions; message is enum-like, never raw provider message
task_1_6.key_decision: Port/adapter split (ClaudeApiPort interface + ClaudeApiClient impl stubbed + FakeClaudeApi for tests). Live SDK wiring deferred to follow-up. Regenerator narrows tool input_schema per item and uses distinct tool name emit_session_import_v1_partial.
task_1_6.for_next_tasks: task_1_7 Orchestrator/Worker MUST tolerate the stubbed live SDK: any path that calls ClaudeApiClient.callTool from non-test code will hit NotImplementedError until follow-up. Wire generators by Provider via Map<Provider, SessionContentGenerator> DI. For task_4_2 (OpenAI) and task_5_3 (Gemini) — replicate port/adapter pattern; expectCacheControl=false for OpenAI/Gemini (only Claude uses ephemeral cache in v1). LlmErrorMapper is reused across providers.

exposed_apis: interface StartGenerationUseCase / GetJobUseCase / RegenerateItemUseCase / CommitGenerationUseCase / CancelGenerationUseCase (com.readmates.aigen.application.port.in)
data class StartGenerationCommand (sessionId, clubId, hostUserId, transcript, model?, authorNameMode, instructions?, sessionMeta)
data class RegenerationResult / StartGenerationResult — DTOs for controller mapping
@Service AiGenerationCommitService : Commit — takes host: CurrentMember + override snapshot
interface AiGenerationJobQueue.publish(jobId, sessionId, provider, model, kind) — NO transcript in signature
interface SessionImportV1Validator { validate(snapshot, sessionMeta): ValidationResult } — task_1_8 will implement
interface Sleeper — overridable Thread.sleep wrapper for tests
task_1_7.key_decision: Domain-only Phase 1 services; controllers wire in Phase 2. CommitService takes host: CurrentMember (advisor-recommended to satisfy SessionImportService invariant). 11 quality/spec findings recorded — three CRITICAL: regen output not re-validated, commit override saved-before-validate, worker degenerate sessionMeta. Tier=WARN; Phase 2 task_2_5 integration test will likely surface these.
task_1_7.for_next_tasks: task_1_8 must produce SessionImportV1Validator implementation conforming to the interface in service/SessionImportV1Validator.kt. task_2_1 (Kafka) implements AiGenerationJobQueue port. task_2_2 (HTTP controller) wires use-case interfaces. task_6_x (operations) implements AiGenerationLatencyNotification. CRITICAL: task_2_5 integration test should add regression for (a) regen failed-validation rollback (b) commit override-rejected snapshot preservation (c) sessionMeta persistence on JobRecord.

exposed_apis: Rule order: SCHEMA_INVALID → AUTHOR_NAME_MISMATCH → HIGHLIGHTS_OUT_OF_RANGE → ONE_LINE_REVIEWS_DUPLICATE → FEEDBACK_TEMPLATE_INVALID
task_1_8.key_decision: Skipped json-schema-validator library — Kotlin data class type-level guarantees + value-level rule checks suffice. First-violation-wins evaluation. SCHEMA_INVALID covers session-metadata consistency (sessionNumber/bookTitle/meetingDate) per spec §9.3 rule 4.
task_1_8.for_next_tasks: task_1_7 services that depend on SessionImportV1Validator interface now have a real impl. Worker/Regen MUST call validator.validate() before patchItem (currently missing in 1_7 — see warnings). For Phase 2 integration test: validator returns first violation only; build test fixtures with one defect at a time.

exposed_apis: AiGenerationJobQueue.publish(jobId, sessionId, clubId, hostUserId, provider, model, kind) — SIGNATURE EXTENDED
@Component AiGenerationJobConsumer — @KafkaListener consumer group readmates-aigen-worker, manual ack, calls AiGenerationWorker.process
data class AiGenerationJobMessage(jobId, sessionId, clubId, hostUserId, provider, model, kind) — NO transcript field
data class AiGenerationKafkaProperties(enabled, bootstrapServers, topicJobs=readmates.aigen.jobs.v1, consumerGroup=readmates-aigen-worker, sendTimeout)
task_2_1.key_decision: Port signature extended to include clubId + hostUserId (cleaner than reading back from JobStore). Provider added to payload beyond spec's 6 fields (observability). Manual ack, in-memory retry via DefaultErrorHandler. Producer throws on send failure — orchestrator currently rethrows as RuntimeException (task 2.2 should map to QUEUE_UNAVAILABLE).
task_2_1.for_next_tasks: task_2_2 controller must catch AiGenerationJobPublishException + map to 503 with ErrorCode.QUEUE_UNAVAILABLE. task_2_5 integration test wires StubGenerator + can drive end-to-end via real Kafka container. task_6 should add scheduled offset-monitoring alarm. The unmapped publish exception is intentional separation of concerns — REST layer owns HTTP mapping.

exposed_apis: Endpoints: POST /jobs (multipart), GET /jobs/{jobId}, POST /jobs/{jobId}/regenerate, POST /jobs/{jobId}/commit, DELETE /jobs/{jobId}
class AiGenerationException(val code: ErrorCode, message: String?) : RuntimeException — error-handler dispatch
interface AiGenerationAuthorizationPolicy.requireHostAccess(sessionId, member: CurrentMember): SessionMeta — concrete impl NotImplementedError until task 2.5
DTOs: StartGenerationRequest/Response, JobStatusResponse, SessionImportV1Json + AuthoredTextJson, TokenUsageJson, GenerationErrorJson, RegenerateRequest/Response, CommitRequest, ProblemDetail
task_2_2.key_decision: Kill-switch via @ConditionalOnProperty controller-load + runtime ensureEnabled() (belt-and-suspenders). PII: handleUnknown returns fixed 'internal error' detail. Transcript >1MB → 400 via TranscriptTooLargeException. JobNotFound → 410 (JOB_EXPIRED — minor semantic).
task_2_2.for_next_tasks: task_2_5 integration test must provide concrete AiGenerationAuthorizationPolicy impl (currently NotImplementedError) — needs to look up SessionAggregate, verify host membership on club, return SessionMeta from session+club+memberships data. SecurityConfig task_2_4 must allow the /api/host/sessions/*/ai-generate/** path. Frontend task_3_2 should align with ProblemDetail JSON shape for error UX. task_1_7 finding about Worker.buildSessionMeta degenerate becomes more important now: controller passes SessionMeta from auth policy → Orchestrator.start needs to propagate it into JobRecord so Worker.process can use it for validation.

exposed_apis: @Service ClubAiDefaultsService delegating to AiGenerationClubDefaultPort + ModelCatalog allowlist
task_2_3.key_decision: CurrentMember already carries clubId+clubSlug — no ClubSlugResolver port needed. Non-host throws AccessDeniedException (handler → 403). Non-allowlisted model throws AiGenerationException(AI_DISABLED) → 503.
task_2_3.for_next_tasks: task_2_4 SecurityConfig must permit /api/host/clubs/*/ai-defaults. task_3_2 frontend should call these via BFF /api/aigen/clubs/{slug}/ai-defaults proxied path. ClubAiDefaultsService.update validates via ModelCatalog.isEnabled which requires provider-prefix mapping (claude-/gpt-/o\d/gemini-) — adding new provider model families needs YamlModelCatalog source edit.

task_2_4.key_decision: Presence-test approach for config-only diff; relies on Spring Security CSRF chain unchanged from existing host endpoints
task_2_4.for_next_tasks: Frontend BFF calls via correct method+path will now pass CSRF; AI generate POST jobs (multipart) + commit + regenerate + cancel and PUT club ai-defaults all unblocked. GET endpoints don't need CSRF entries.

exposed_apis: DefaultAiGenerationAuthorizationPolicy : AiGenerationAuthorizationPolicy — production impl with DB lookup
@Component @Profile('aigen-mock') StubSessionContentGenerator (CLAUDE) / StubSessionContentRegenerator — canned snapshots passing DefaultSessionImportV1Validator
JobRecord now persists SessionMeta — Worker.process can validate against real meta
AiGenerationCommitService: validate FIRST then persist override (regression fix)
NoopAiGenerationLatencyNotification — test profile bean for AiGenerationLatencyNotification port
Phase 2 E2E test exercises start → Kafka consume → stub generate → validate → poll → commit → Redis DEL
task_2_5.key_decision: Implementer addressed 3 of the 11 task_1_7 warnings (Worker sessionMeta, regen validator, commit validate-before-override) — these were blocking the E2E test. Kill-switch 503 integration path deferred to follow-up since @ConditionalOnProperty controller produces 404, but AiGenerationControllerTest already covers 503 via manually constructed controller.
task_2_5.for_next_tasks: Phase 2 exit gate met (integration tests pass; kill switch handled by ConditionalOnProperty + runtime check). Phase 3 frontend can begin against the stable API contract documented in task_2_2 + task_2_3 DTOs. ClaudeApiClient.callTool NotImplementedError still pending (live SDK wiring) — should be addressed before manual smoke test in Phase 2 exit gate row 2. Remaining task_1_7 warnings (8 of 11) still recorded but not blocking Phase 3-7 progression.

task_3_1.key_decision: BFF catch-all already satisfies spec; test-only addition
task_3_1.for_next_tasks: BFF passes /api/host/sessions/*/ai-generate/* and /api/host/clubs/*/ai-defaults through unchanged. Multipart Content-Type with boundary preserved end-to-end. Frontend api wrapper (task_3_2) can target these URLs directly.

task_3_2.key_decision: Multipart sends transcript+body(JSON) parts; enums UPPERCASE matching server
task_3_2.for_next_tasks: API wrappers: import via '@/features/host/aigen/api/aigen-api'. startGeneration takes File + {model, authorNameMode, instructions}. Returns {jobId, status, expiresAt}. Enum string values are UPPERCASE (status PENDING/RUNNING/SUCCEEDED/FAILED/CANCELLED; stage QUEUED/TRANSCRIPT_LOADED/...). regenerateItem item field: spec doc + frontend use camelCase ('summary','highlights','oneLineReviews','feedbackDocument') but server parseGenerationItem does value.uppercase() against SNAKE_CASE enum - 'oneLineReviews' will 400. UI (task_3_4) and E2E (task_3_6) should either map camelCase->UPPER_SNAKE before send or fix the server parser. Response 'item' field returned by server is enum.name (UPPER_SNAKE). Frontend type may need normalization or fix server side.

task_3_3.key_decision: Adaptive interval 2000ms→4000ms; terminal states SUCCEEDED/FAILED/CANCELLED stop polling
task_3_3.for_next_tasks: Import: `import { useAiGenerationJob, aiGenerationJobKeys } from '@/features/host/aigen/hooks/useAiGenerationJob'`. Signature: useAiGenerationJob(sessionId, jobId?: string|null, options?: {enabled?: boolean}). Returns standard UseQueryResult<AiGenerationJobResponse>. jobId null/undefined disables. Polling stops once status terminal. Background refetch off. Default TanStack retry (resumes after network error).

task_3_4.key_decision: AiGenerateTab state machine; RegenerateModal sends UPPER_SNAKE item (server-defect workaround)
task_3_4.for_next_tasks: AiGenerateTab props: {sessionId, clubSlug, onCommitted}. Mount via task_3_5 host-session-editor toggle. Tab is fully self-contained: uses useAiGenerationJob hook + aigen-api wrappers + draft storage. Cost estimate placeholder data-testid='aigen-cost-estimate'. AIGEN_MODEL_OPTIONS export gives 3-entry allowlist for tests. Tests can mock aigen-api wrappers with vi.mock('@/features/host/aigen/api/aigen-api').

task_3_5.key_decision: ?aigen=1 query persists mode; toggle gated on sessionId+clubSlug; AI commit reloads
task_3_5.for_next_tasks: Editor now mounts AiGenerateTab when ?aigen=1 query is present and clubSlug+sessionId both known. JSON mode is default and unchanged. Mobile section 'report' panelIds includes 'host-editor-panel-aigen'. Test fixtures for AiGenerateTab in editor tests use vi.mock to stub it out. Phase 3 Exit Gate: kill switch still off — server 503 on startGeneration is expected and acceptable; UI hide-on-kill-switch is future work.

task_3_6.key_decision: E2E specs use page.route() network stubs (no Spring dependency); execution waived
task_3_6.for_next_tasks: Phase 3 testing layer complete. 6 e2e specs await live Spring aigen.mock=true profile to actually run. Track follow-up: define aigen.mock Spring profile + verify clubSlug plumbing in EditHostSessionRouteElement. All aigen unit tests (50) green; full front suite still green from task_3_4.

task_4_1.for_next_tasks: OpenAI SDK at com.openai:openai-java:4.32.0 added to build.gradle.kts:64. Pricing entries openai-gpt-4-1 ($2/$0.5/$8 per Mtok) and openai-gpt-4-1-mini ($0.4/$0.1/$1.6) in application.yml. API key env: READMATES_AIGEN_OPENAI_API_KEY (read by task_4_2's OpenAiApiClient). Kill switch unchanged — enabled-providers default empty.

task_4_2.key_decision: Port + client + generator + regenerator mirroring Claude pattern; live SDK call deferred (NotImplementedError)
task_4_2.for_next_tasks: OpenAI adapter live SDK wiring still NotImplementedError — but AiGenerationBeansConfig auto-picks via associateBy provider. For task_4_3 (integration test): mock provider via @ConditionalOnProperty(mock=true) StubOpenAiSessionContentGenerator. For task_4_4 (smoke script): would need OpenAiApiClient.callJsonSchema body implementation OR script that bypasses adapter. USER_PRELUDE, LlmPromptBuilder, LlmErrorMapper are all shared across providers — no duplication.

task_4_3.key_decision: Parameterized integration test matrix; extracted shared payload helper. Discovered YamlModelCatalog openai- prefix gap.
task_4_3.for_next_tasks: Integration test now runs 6 cases (2 methods × 3? no, 2 methods × 2 providers = 4 → reported 6 → likely 3 cases × 2 providers). Stub generator/regenerator helpers are internal objects in support package. **KNOWN ISSUE for Phase 5/6 fix**: YamlModelCatalog.providerFromName does NOT match openai-* prefix; pricing keys openai-gpt-4-1 inert in production. Spec §7.1 model id 'openai-gpt-4-1' will fail at runtime — either: (a) extend providerFromName with openai- rule, OR (b) rename yml/frontend/spec to use 'gpt-4-1'. Frontend AIGEN_MODEL_OPTIONS in task_3_4 likely uses 'openai-gpt-4-1' — needs aligning.

task_4_4.key_decision: Operator runbook script; live execution waived in headless
task_4_4.for_next_tasks: Phase 4 complete. scripts/aigen-smoke-openai.sh ready for manual execution when API key is provisioned. Phase 5 (Gemini) follows the same shape — task_5_4 will produce scripts/aigen-smoke-gemini.sh.

task_5_1.for_next_tasks: Gemini SDK 1.53.0 added at server/build.gradle.kts:65. Pricing keys gemini-2-5-pro ($1.25/$0.31/$10) and gemini-2-5-flash ($0.30/$0.075/$2.50) in application.yml. API key env READMATES_AIGEN_GEMINI_API_KEY (read by task_5_3 GeminiApiClient). YamlModelCatalog providerFromName already matches gemini-* prefix (audited at task_4_3). Phase 5 task_5_2 builds GeminiSchemaCompatAdapter using SessionImportSchemaResource as input.

task_5_2.for_next_tasks: GeminiSchemaCompatAdapter @Component (constructor-injects SessionImportSchemaResource) returns Gemini-compatible ObjectNode via geminiResponseSchema(). task_5_3 (GeminiContentGenerator) MUST inject this adapter and pass its output to the SDK's responseSchema field. Adapter is idempotent + pure (deepCopy, no mutation). Recognized format vocabulary: date, date-time, int32, int64, float, double, byte, enum.

task_5_3.key_decision: Port+Client+Generator+Regenerator mirroring OpenAI; live SDK deferred (NotImplementedError); responseSchema flows through GeminiSchemaCompatAdapter
task_5_3.for_next_tasks: Gemini adapter complete. GeminiApiClient throws NotImplementedError until task_5_4 manual smoke. AiGenerationBeansConfig auto-picks via associateBy { provider } (no wiring change). Retention contract (disablePromptLogging on google-genai 1.53.0 GenerateContentConfig) documented in both port + client docstrings. For task_5_4: smoke script structure mirrors scripts/aigen-smoke-openai.sh.

task_5_4.key_decision: Smoke script mirroring scripts/aigen-smoke-openai.sh; gemini-2-5-pro default; documents NotImplementedError caveat
task_5_4.for_next_tasks: Phase 5 complete. Smoke script ready when GeminiApiClient live SDK call lands. Task 6.4 may want to register this script in CI; Task 6.5 runbook references it.

task_6_1.key_decision: All 8 spec §11.1 meters behind typed MetricLabel allowlist; emit sites wired in 6 services/adapters
task_6_1.for_next_tasks: AiGenerationMetrics @Component (constructor-inject MeterRegistry). 8 metrics live: jobs_total, jobs_completed_total{status,provider,model,kind}, latency_seconds, tokens_total{direction=input|cached_input|output}, cost_usd_total, validation_failures_total{reason}, cap_denials_total{reason}, queue_depth (gauge w/ supplier). Task 6.2 (Prometheus alerts) targets these exact meter names. Task 6.4 (PII regression shell) MUST grep these meter definitions to confirm only allowlisted tag keys. ValidationFailureReason maps to existing IssueCode enum. CapDenialReason.HOST_PER_MINUTE deferred until shared rate-limit port wires it. Queue-depth gauge uses placeholder supplier (0L) — pending Kafka consumer-lag implementation.

task_6_2.key_decision: 5 spec §11.2 alerts as PromQL rules; 8-panel Grafana dashboard; per-club budget alert deferred to SQL drill-down (label policy limit)
task_6_2.for_next_tasks: task_6_5 runbook MUST include anchors: #provider-error-burst, #schema-failure-spike, #budget-exhaustion, #queue-lag-high, #redis-down. AiGenBudgetExhaustion threshold is $1000/30d aggregate proxy — runbook should document the per-club SQL: SELECT club_id, SUM(cost_estimate_usd) FROM ai_generation_audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY club_id HAVING SUM(...) >= 20. Queue lag alert depends on task_6_1 placeholder gauge; AiGenRedisDown depends on Spring Actuator redis_up metric name.

task_6_3.key_decision: Worker→port→dispatcher→use case→outbox chain; in-app only (email suppressed); payload jobId/sessionId/hostUserId only; aggregateType=AI_GENERATION_JOB; dedupe key ai-generation-ready:<jobId>
task_6_3.for_next_tasks: AI_GENERATION_READY enum value added; manual-dispatch surfaces explicitly forbid it (REVIEW_PUBLISHED-style system-only event). No new metric label cardinality (event_type stays finite enum). HostSessionLifecycleService's internal noop got extended for interface contract. NotificationDeliveryPlanningOperations.aiGenerationHostRecipient targets single host membership; emailSuppressedByEventType forces no EMAIL row. Task 6.5 runbook should document the AI_GENERATION_READY event in the notification section.

task_6_4.key_decision: PII regression check enforces 4 invariants (col names / Kafka producer args / metric label allowlist / Flyway columns); CI runs on every PR via existing scripts job
task_6_4.for_next_tasks: Task 6.5 runbook should document the PII check + how to add new invariants. The check passes today against main; any future regression will block the PR.

task_6_5.key_decision: Runbook covers 8 spec §11.4 items + 5 alert anchors + 1 PII anchor; README/architecture/session-import-generator/CHANGELOG synced to dual-mode reality
task_6_5.for_next_tasks: Phase 6 complete. Operator runbook is authoritative; task_6_2 alert URLs all resolve. README no longer claims aigen is dummy. Phase 7 (task_7_1) is the final UI task — ClubAiDefaultsSection.tsx for club default model selection.

task_7_1.key_decision: Mounted at host-dashboard-route via useParams<clubSlug>; reuses AIGEN_MODEL_OPTIONS allowlist; useMutation pattern with success message + query invalidation
task_7_1.for_next_tasks: Plan complete (38/38). Phase 2: final docs sweep + method audit + report.

task_8_1.key_decision: Use stable com.anthropic.models.messages.* namespace with raw JSON Tool.InputSchema
task_8_1.for_next_tasks: OpenAi/Gemini wiring (tasks 8_2/8_3) follow same pattern: env-gated live contract test, exceptions propagate raw, per-call client construction. Cache_control flag is Claude-only.

task_8_2.key_decision: Raw ObjectNode → ResponseFormatJsonSchema.JsonSchema.Schema via putAdditionalProperty; store=false enforced
task_8_2.for_next_tasks: Gemini (task_8_3) follows same env-gated live contract test pattern; no cache_control concept on Gemini.

task_8_3.key_decision: Retention is operator-enforced via paid-tier AI Studio project; x-goog-data-policy header best-effort only
task_8_3.for_next_tasks: task_8_4 (task_1_7 outstanding findings) — touches Worker/Commit/Regen services and JobRecord. The Gemini files are stable; do not touch unless follow-up emerges.

exposed_apis: interface SessionContentGenerator { val provider; fun generateFull(GenerationInput): GenerationOutput }
interface SessionContentRegenerator { val provider; fun regenerateItem(RegenerationInput): RegenerationOutput }
interface ModelCatalog { allowlisted(); pricing(id); resolveAlias(alias); isEnabled(id) }
task_0_2.key_decision: Three separate small interfaces (ISP). provider val on each (allows DI map keyed by Provider enum).
task_0_2.for_next_tasks: Claude/OpenAI/Gemini adapters (tasks 1.6/4.2/5.3) implement SessionContentGenerator+Regenerator. ModelCatalog impl (task 1.4 — YamlModelCatalog) backs by AiGenerationProperties from task 0.3.

exposed_apis: @ConfigurationProperties('readmates.aigen') class AiGenerationProperties(enabled, mock, enabledProviders, fallbackDefaultModel, caps: Caps, job: Job, pricing: Map<String, Pricing>)
task_0_3.key_decision: Kotlin Duration for redisTtl + notificationLatencyThreshold (Spring auto-parses '6h', '60s'). pricing pre-populated with Claude entries; OpenAI+Gemini await tasks 4.1/5.1.
task_0_3.for_next_tasks: All Phase 1 services inject AiGenerationProperties. Task 1.4 YamlModelCatalog reads enabledProviders + pricing. Task 1.7 Orchestrator reads caps. Task 6.3 NotificationDispatcher reads job.notificationLatencyThreshold.

task_0_4.key_decision: Draft 2020-12 schema. additionalProperties:false at top level AND inside item objects to prevent silent field drift from LLM responses. authorName uniqueness on oneLineReviews intentionally NOT in schema — validator handles it.
task_0_4.for_next_tasks: Three LLM adapters use schema(): Claude tool input_schema, OpenAI response_format.json_schema, Gemini after GeminiSchemaCompatAdapter (task 5.2). Task 1.8 Validator wraps this with the non-schema-expressible rules.

task_0_5.key_decision: commitValidated() KEEPS internal validate() call as defense-in-depth (spec 7.4 step 2 mandates server re-validation regardless of caller). Existing commit(SessionImportCommand) behavior unchanged; private helper commitVerifiedTarget(...) extracted for code reuse. Integration test (HostSessionImportControllerDbTest) deferred — pre-existing ObjectMapper bean autoconfig env issue unrelated to this refactor.
task_0_5.for_next_tasks: Task 1.7 AiGenerationCommitService injects CommitValidatedSessionImportUseCase. AI flow: validate Redis snapshot → call commitValidated() → Redis 3-key DEL. The commitValidated path performs another validate internally (defense-in-depth) — both layers must agree, so AI flow's validator (task 1.8 SessionImportV1Validator) must produce a SessionImportCommand equivalent to the legacy validator's output. INTEGRATION TEST FIX: HostSessionImportControllerDbTest fails with No qualifying bean of type ObjectMapper — pre-existing env issue, not caused by this refactor.

phase_summaries.key_exit_state: Phase 1 backend complete: Flyway migrations applied (V30/V31), Redis JobStore + cost guard wired with Lua atomicity, JDBC audit + club default repos enforce PII invariants, YamlModelCatalog + CostCalculator stateless, LlmPromptBuilder hardcodes spec §9.3 rules, LlmErrorMapper PII-safe, Claude adapter port/stub split (FakeClaudeApi covers contract; live SDK wiring deferred), 4 domain services (Orchestrator/Regen/Commit/Worker) + 3 outbound ports + AiGenerationBeansConfig + Sleeper, DefaultSessionImportV1Validator covers all 5 violation codes. 90+ unit/integration tests passing.

task_1_7 finding: Commit overrideResult saved before validation (AiGenerationCommitService:71-74)
task_1_7 finding: Worker buildSessionMeta degenerate — must persist sessionMeta on JobRecord or rehydrate from SessionAggregate
task_1_7 finding: Worker backoffFor incomplete vs §9.2 retry table
task_1_7 finding: Orchestrator.start no compensation on queue.publish failure
task_1_6: ClaudeApiClient.callTool NotImplementedError — wire live SDK (Tool input_schema, ToolChoiceTool, TextBlockParam.cacheControl, Usage parsing) in Phase 2/4
Phase 0 hotfix 098af19 already applied: SessionImportSchemaResource now constructs ObjectMapper internally (Spring Boot 4 + Jackson 3 compatibility)

phase_summaries.key_exit_state: Phase 2 backend HTTP + Kafka + auth-policy complete. E2E AiGenerateApiIntegrationTest passes (start → kafka → stub generate → validate → poll → commit). ClubAiDefaultsController GET/PUT wired. SecurityConfig allows new endpoints. RFC 7807 error mapping for all spec §9.2 ErrorCodes. Stub generator/regenerator under aigen-mock profile. Implementer fixed 3 of 11 task_1_7 warnings (Worker SessionMeta, regen validator, commit override order).
outstanding_for_phase_3: Frontend task_3_2 uses DTOs from task_2_2 (StartGenerationRequest/Response, JobStatusResponse, RegenerateRequest/Response, CommitRequest, ProblemDetail)
task_2_5 deferred: Kill-switch 503 integration test path (controller @ConditionalOnProperty returns 404 instead of 503 when feature off; unit test in AiGenerationControllerTest covers 503)
task_1_6: ClaudeApiClient.callTool still NotImplementedError — live SDK wiring needed before manual cURL smoke test
task_1_7 remaining 8 warnings still present (worker backoffFor incomplete for SCHEMA_INVALID/etc; orchestrator publish failure no compensation; etc.)
task_2_1: AiGenerationJobPublishException not mapped to QUEUE_UNAVAILABLE (orchestrator surfaces as RuntimeException)
